description: Create a structured local skill from questionnaire answers while preserving the full think to reflect lifecycle.
when_to_use: Use when a new in-house skill should be scaffolded from a questionnaire instead of hand-writing the tmpl file.
Use when the operator wants deterministic questionnaire to tmpl generation with lifecycle preservation.
triggers: create a new skill from answers
preserve full lifecycle in the new skill
jobs_to_be_done: turn answered questions into a valid SKILL.md.tmpl source file
carry the tmpl forward into deterministic skill generation
keep think, plan, build, review, test, ship, and reflect explicit

notes: Do not collapse the lifecycle into a shorter loop.
Allow light local adaptation but keep all lifecycle stages visible.

inputs: optional local notes about scripts and references
constraints: make generated artifacts reproducible and removable
host_notes: Use compat adapters rather than replacing local governance.
